block_00: Learn how to place a demo deal and access essential features with ease
block_03: We're excited to give you a tour of our Traderoom interface and show you how to place your first demo deal. Let's dive in!
block_05: On the left-hand side, you'll find the sidebar, which contains essential features like the asset selector, portfolio value, trading history, chats and support, economic calendar, and video tutorials. Simply click on the respective icons to access these features.
block_08: Choosing an asset has never been easier. Click the "+" on the left sidebar to access the asset selector. You'll find a wide range of instruments, including Forex pairs, stocks, indices, commodities, and cryptocurrencies. The Trending category shows top risers and fallers in real-time.
block_11: In the lower-left corner of the trading chart, you can find a menu with a range of tools for chart adjustments and technical analysis. You can choose a chart type, adjust candle time periods, apply graphical tools like trend lines, and spice things up with top indicators.
block_13: Ready to place your first demo deal? Follow these simple steps:
block_14: Choose an asset from the asset selector;
block_15: Assume the asset’s price direction and set a trading volume;
block_16: Apply stop-loss and take-profit orders if needed and press the "Buy" or "Sell" button.
block_18: Need Help? We're Here for You!
block_19: If you have any questions or need assistance, our
block_21: is just a click away. Simply reach out via live chat in the traderoom and we'll be happy to assist you.
block_22: We hope this tour has been helpful. In the next email, we’ll guide you through our hassle-free verification flow — stay tuned!
